name: Italian Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 each salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Line pan with foil. Preheat pan to 400°F.
2. Remove as much fat as possible from the pork.
3. Mix together the garlic and sage.
4. With a sharp knife, make deep incisions in the pork and insert a little spice mix into each cut.
5. Brush meat with olive oil and place on baking tray.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until meat thermometer reaches 160°F.
7. Remove pork and cover with foil. Let stand for 10 minutes.
8. Slice and serve over lentils.
